name: Pizza Primavera
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Healthy favorites low-fat mozzarella, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Cook vegetables until crisp-tender and drain excess moisture.
3. Sprinkle 1/4 cup mozzarella on each pita bread round.
4. Top with tomato slices and basil.
5. Arrange cooked vegetables and peas on top of the tomatoes.
6. Sprinkle remaining mozzarella and Parmesan over the toppings.
7. Place on a cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 8 minutes or until the mozzarella cheese is melted.
